Episodes.Title: Invisible Killer
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Alex Bystram
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Brian Rhodes, Michael Carley
Episodes.Plot: It's called a microburst, but the havoc it wreaked on Delta Airlines Flight 191 was anything but minuscule.

Episodes.Title: Behind Closed Doors
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, John Watson, Robin Wilcock
Episodes.Plot: It's one of the most alarming disasters in the history of aviation, not just because of the crash, but why it happened.

Episodes.Title: Gimli Glider
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Dave Bene
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Robert Bockstael, Randy Thomas
Episodes.Plot: Relive the incredible story of a pilot forced to glide an engineless 767 to safety, from over 26,000 feet in the air.

Episodes.Title: Dead Weight
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Mike Sheehan
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Mary Krohnert, Jesse Bond
Episodes.Plot: See how two unrelated failures combined to create a fatal catastrophe, and changed the history of small plane travel.

Episodes.Title: Fanning the Flames
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Ivan Sherry, Simon Northwood
Episodes.Plot: To find the cause of the crash of Flight 295, they had to dig deep...3 miles deep to the floor of the Indian Ocean.

Episodes.Title: Southern Storm
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Christopher Blow
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Brian Young, Paul Braunstein
Episodes.Plot: Torrential rain. Baseball-sized hail. Why did Flight 242 enter this severe storm, and what caused its engines to fail?

Episodes.Title: Explosive Evidence
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Adam Basheer, Suresh John
Episodes.Plot: A terrorist's bomb blew up Air India Flight 182, but the biggest crime was that it all could have been prevented.

Episodes.Title: Mixed Signals
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Dave Bene
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Hrant Alianak, Jorge Molina
Episodes.Plot: There are many factors affecting an aircraft in flight. Any one of them can bring the plane down. But as the investigation reveals yet again, the most common one is the human factor.

Episodes.Title: Fatal Distraction
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Carl Knutson
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Shawn Lawrence, Shaun Smyth
Episodes.Plot: The Eastern Airlines flight 401 crash: the deadliest disaster in U.S. civil aviation history.

Episodes.Title: Phantom Strike
Episodes.Writer: Andre Barro, Bernard Vaillot, Larry Bambrick
Episodes.Actors: Jonathan Aris, Simon Reynolds, Gord Rand
Episodes.Plot: A business jet on a delivery flight from Brazil to the US is shaken by a massive hit over the Amazon rainforest. The pilots manage to land the damaged aircraft, but they soon find out that they had a mid-air collision with a passe...
